description: Task-oriented Sentinel content workflow actions. These map operator intent to local lifecycle transitions, visible operational artefacts or existing allowlisted execution.

actions.label: Review opportunity
actions.description: Confirm the content opportunity is worth moving into the research queue.
actions.expectedResult: Opportunity accepted into the research queue.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Review the research summary and generate an editorial brief.

producedArtifacts.label: Research summary
producedArtifacts.description: Visible research context is prepared in the Workbench.
producedArtifacts.summary: Opportunity rationale, search intent and suggested angle are now ready to review.

actions.recovery: Leave it discovered if the rationale is not strong enough yet.

actions.label: Move to planning
actions.description: Record that the opportunity has enough context to become a planned content item.
actions.expectedResult: Content item moved into planning with a visible planning decision.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Generate or review the editorial brief.

producedArtifacts.label: Planning decision
producedArtifacts.description: The item is now visible as planned work in the Workbench.
producedArtifacts.summary: The opportunity is ready for brief review and package preparation.

actions.recovery: Keep it in research if the scope is not clear enough for planning yet.

actions.label: Start research
actions.description: Move the item into research so source material, search intent and angle can be clarified.
actions.expectedResult: Research summary prepared in the Workbench.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Review the research summary, then generate the editorial brief.

producedArtifacts.label: Research summary
producedArtifacts.description: Search intent, source signals and suggested angle are visible in the item panel.
producedArtifacts.summary: Research context is ready for brief generation.

actions.recovery: Move it back to planning if the brief is not ready for research.

actions.label: Generate brief
actions.description: Create a visible editorial brief object for review before any drafting starts.
actions.expectedResult: Editorial brief created for review in the Workbench.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Review the brief, then create the first draft.

producedArtifacts.label: Editorial brief
producedArtifacts.description: Structured brief preview is now visible in the item panel.
producedArtifacts.summary: Intent, suggested structure, target angle and CTA guidance are ready to review.

actions.recovery: If no linked plan exists, review the opportunity and create or refresh an execution plan first.

actions.label: Create draft
actions.description: Create an editable starter draft from the reviewed brief so the article can be worked inside Sentinel.
actions.expectedResult: Editable starter draft created in the Workbench.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Edit the draft, preview it, then move it to review.

producedArtifacts.label: Editable draft
producedArtifacts.description: A structured draft with editable title, intro, sections, CTA and notes is visible in the draft workspace.
producedArtifacts.summary: The article is now available as an editable work-in-progress draft.
producedArtifacts.nextAction: Edit and preview the draft before moving to review.

actions.recovery: If the brief is not strong enough, keep the item in planning and add review notes before creating the draft.

actions.label: Prepare work package
actions.description: Create a scoped implementation package that defines the drafting work and review checklist.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Start drafting against the package, then move the item to review.

producedArtifacts.label: Implementation package
producedArtifacts.description: Scope, task list and safety constraints are visible in the item panel.
producedArtifacts.summary: Drafting scope and review criteria are ready.

actions.recovery: If there is no prompt yet, generate or review the brief before moving into review.

actions.label: Move to review
actions.description: Mark the article work as ready for editorial judgement.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Complete editorial review, then mark ready when the work has passed.

producedArtifacts.label: Review checklist
producedArtifacts.description: Review criteria and QA context are visible in the item panel.
producedArtifacts.summary: The item is ready for editorial judgement.

actions.recovery: Move it back to drafting if more content work is needed.

actions.label: Mark ready
actions.description: Record that the content work has passed review and is ready for the next controlled publishing step.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Publish through the controlled editorial process outside Sentinel, then mark published.

producedArtifacts.label: Readiness decision
producedArtifacts.description: The review decision is visible in the item panel.
producedArtifacts.summary: The item has passed review and is ready for the controlled publishing step.
producedArtifacts.nextAction: Mark published after publishing happens outside Sentinel.

actions.recovery: Move it back to review if QA or editorial issues remain.

actions.label: Mark published
actions.description: Record local workflow state after the content has been published outside this Workbench.
actions.expectedResult: Item marked published locally. This does not publish content.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Refresh monitoring to confirm QA and content health after publication.

producedArtifacts.label: Publication record
producedArtifacts.description: The item is recorded as published in the local Workbench lifecycle.
producedArtifacts.summary: Publication has been recorded locally. Sentinel has not published content.

actions.recovery: Move it back to ready if publication has not actually happened.

actions.label: Refresh monitoring
actions.description: Run the allowlisted SEO monitor and move published or reviewed work into monitoring after a successful check.
actions.expectedResult: SEO monitor completed and workflow moved into monitoring.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Review the monitor summary. If healthy, continue weekly monitoring.

producedArtifacts.label: Resource QA report
producedArtifacts.description: Updated by the safe monitor action.
producedArtifacts.summary: Post-publication content health is ready to review.

actions.recovery: Run diagnostics if monitoring fails or the API is unavailable.

actions.label: Open diagnostics
actions.description: Run the allowlisted doctor check when an item needs platform context before work continues.
actions.expectedResult: Diagnostics completed through the safe action API.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Review the diagnostic summary and resolve any warnings before progressing blocked work.

producedArtifacts.label: Sentinel doctor report
producedArtifacts.description: Updated by the safe diagnostic action.

actions.recovery: Check the Operator Console history for details if diagnostics fail.

actions.label: Generate roadmap update
actions.description: Refresh Sentinel roadmap intelligence when repeated content friction should influence future improvements.
actions.expectedResult: Roadmap intelligence refreshed through the safe action API.
actions.suggestedNextAction: Review the roadmap intelligence panel for the next improvement candidate.

producedArtifacts.label: Roadmap intelligence JSON
producedArtifacts.description: Updated by the safe roadmap action.

actions.recovery: Use feedback backlog review if the roadmap refresh fails.
